title: Maneye Mantralaya
subTitle: Avani and her husband Akshay navigate life within a close-knit joint family. However, unforeseen challenges soon emerge and threaten to disrupt their peaceful existence.

title: Sri Gandhada Gudi
subTitle: Chandana marries into a family with a troubled past in order to escape her fate. However, can she restore the family's hope?

title: Muddu Sose
subTitle: Vidya's dream of becoming a doctor is threatened when her father decides to get her married. Unfortunately, her father-in-law also believes that women should not pursue education.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Karthikeya decides to go to the ashram after the war instead of returning to Kailash. While the Krittikas are overjoyed, they also voice their disagreement about letting him stay there. Will Karthikeya ultimately return to Kailash?

title: Shantam Paapam
subTitle: A compilation of crime stories that depict the gripping real life incidents and sheds light on the victim's battle for justice.

title: Prema Kavya
subTitle: Two sisters, Prema and Kavya, are pushed into marriages they don't want. However, they struggle with love and lies as they seek happiness in their relationships.

title: Raani
subTitle: Rani, who has a hearing impairment, leads a quiet life in a village with her pet goat, Cherry. However, her peaceful existence changes when she meets Arjun, a well-mannered city boy.

title: Bhagya Lakshmi
subTitle: Sisters Bhagya and Lakshmi love each other unconditionally and share a close bond. Soon, Bhagya sets out in search of an ideal groom for Lakshmi who can keep her sister happy.

title: Aajay
subTitle: Ajay, a kabaddi player, hides Padma from Veerabhadra, a gangster who wants to force her into marrying him. Soon, the two fall in love.

title: Pavada Purusha
subTitle: Furious at Panch's threat of legal action, Devappa unleashes his malevolent powers, causing widespread destruction in the village.

title: Pavada Purusha
